name: gemini.models.generate_content
description: Gemini multimodal: an image-bearing part. `inline_data: {mime_type, data}` where `data` is base64 (truncated here for fixture readability). Renderer shows the image as a clickable thumbnail (via ClickableImage). PDF and audio land here too with their respective mime types.

parts.text: What is in this image? One sentence.
A single black pixel on a transparent background.
